description_long: This radiator features a series of evenly spaced, vertical slats made from a material with a warm, wood-like appearance. The slats are connected at the top and bottom by horizontal bars, forming a tall, rectangular frame. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible valves, knobs, or decorative embellishments. The gaps between the slats allow for efficient airflow, enhancing heat dissipation. The surface appears smooth and hard, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet sturdy build, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A tall, rectangular radiator with vertical wooden slats and a minimalist, modern design. The surface is smooth and matte, with evenly spaced gaps for airflow.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of vertical slats and the rectangular frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and depth of the radiator, with slats appearing as a single line.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same vertical slat arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the slats.
